summary: Iteration 41: UnifiedLogin Page Premium UI Testing — All 14 test cases passed (100%). 2-column layout, visual elements, admin login flow, registration flow, responsive behavior, and all data-testid attributes verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedLogin.js well-structured with clear step-based state management (email, password, magic_link, register, registered)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Framer-motion animations implemented correctly with fadeUp and fadeIn variants
Responsive CSS breakpoints at 960px, 600px, and 380px working as expected
Password visibility toggle implemented correctly with proper accessibility (aria-label)
Error handling with visual feedback (ul-error class) properly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: UnifiedLogin page fully tested and working. Premium 2-column layout with left visual branding and right form column. All step transitions (email→password→admin redirect, email→register) working. Responsive behavior verified at 768px (tablet) and 375px (mobile). All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.
